meaning: vt.吃同类的肉,拆用...的配件,调拨...的人员vi.吃人肉,拆用配件,调拨人员
examples: A website need not cannibalize existing sales.
We must stop to cannibalize each other.
There are many ways to cannibalize a business.
One could even argue that Note-sized smartphones might eventually even cannibalize the need for tablets proper.
When we introduced netbooks three years ago people were worried that it would cannibalize the notebook.
